$comment: Externalized harness policy data (HARNESS-020). The scan ENGINE lives in scripts/harness/*; this file holds the project-specific POLICY so the engine is repo-agnostic. Edit values here instead of hardcoding literals in scan scripts.

neutrality.$comment: Per-subsystem library-neutrality policy DATA (HARNESS-DIET-002). The neutrality scan ENGINES live in scripts/harness/scan-*-neutrality.mjs; their Robota-specific target paths / allowlists / forbidden terms live here so the engines stay repo-agnostic.
